title: Organize Vacation Photos
drDigitalIntro: You have dozens of photos from a family vacation scattered in your Photos library. Your task is to create an album for the trip, mark your favorite photos, edit a photo by cropping and adjusting brightness, organize photos by people and places, share an album with family, and archive photos you don't want visible. This is what managing a photo library looks like.
drDigitalHint: Start by creating an album and dragging vacation photos into it.
